curation.synopsis: Asurmen is the first and greatest of the Phoenix Lords, the legendary warrior-teachers of the aeldari. In the present, he intervenes in a reckless scheme launched by a farseer of Anuiven to reclaim a powerful artefact, a gambit that has drawn the murderous Flesh Thieves down upon the eldar. To avert the coming disaster he co-opts a peaceful pilot, Neridiath, whose calm spirit is unsettled by the warrior soul that walks beside her. As they fight, Asurmen tells her of his past: of the long decline of his people, the cataclysm that shattered their empire, and the choices that turned a survivor of the ruins into the first of the Phoenix Lords. A dual-timeline meditation on grief, duty, and the long shadow of a fallen civilisation.

flags.reason: Phoenix Lord / aspect-warrior aeldari protagonist mapped to pc_xenos; no aeldari-specific protagonist_class value
